laptops.name: UNIBAY Phantom 17 Pro
laptops.description: The Phantom 17 Pro is our absolute flagship gaming laptop. Powered by an Intel Core i9-14900HX and a full-power NVIDIA GeForce RTX 4090 Laptop GPU, this 17.3-inch powerhouse delivers desktop-class frame rates without compromise. The 240Hz Mini-LED QHD display with 1000 nits peak brightness and 100% DCI-P3 coverage makes every game and every film look breathtaking. Built-in Thunderbolt 5, Wi-Fi 7, and a 99.9Wh battery round out a machine that refuses to settle.

specs.Processor: Intel Core i9-14900HX (24 cores, up to 5.8GHz)
specs.Graphics: NVIDIA GeForce RTX 4090 Laptop GPU 16GB GDDR6
specs.Connectivity: Thunderbolt 5, HDMI 2.1, USB-A 3.2 x2, Wi-Fi 7, BT 5.4

features: MUX switch for direct GPU output
Windows Hello IR camera + fingerprint reader

laptops.name: UNIBAY Phantom 17
laptops.description: The Phantom 17 delivers RTX 4080-class gaming in a large-screen chassis for those who will not settle for anything less than ultra settings at 1440p. A 240Hz QHD display, Intel Core i9-14900HX processor, and vapour-chamber cooling ensure sustained peak performance even in marathon gaming sessions. Thunderbolt 4 and Wi-Fi 6E keep you connected at speed.

specs.Processor: Intel Core i9-14900HX (24 cores, up to 5.8GHz)
specs.Graphics: NVIDIA GeForce RTX 4080 Laptop GPU 12GB GDDR6
specs.Connectivity: Thunderbolt 4, HDMI 2.1, USB-A 3.2 x2, Wi-Fi 6E, BT 5.3

laptops.name: UNIBAY Phantom 15
laptops.description: The Phantom 15 is our most popular laptop. At 2.1 kg it travels easily, yet the RTX 4070 Laptop GPU and Intel Core i7-14700HX deliver serious gaming and creative performance. The 165Hz QHD OLED panel with 0.2ms response and 100% DCI-P3 is simply the best display at this price point. Four hours of battery in mixed gaming means it keeps up on the road.

specs.Processor: Intel Core i7-14700HX (20 cores, up to 5.4GHz)
specs.Graphics: NVIDIA GeForce RTX 4070 Laptop GPU 8GB GDDR6
specs.Connectivity: Thunderbolt 4, HDMI 2.1, USB-A 3.2 x2, Wi-Fi 6E, BT 5.3

laptops.name: UNIBAY Viper 16
laptops.description: The Viper 16 hits the sweet spot between price and performance. An RTX 4060 Laptop GPU and Intel Core i7-14650HX handle 1080p and most 1440p titles at high settings with ease. The 144Hz IPS panel offers smooth gameplay and the 86Wh battery stretches comfortably past five hours in everyday use. At this price, nothing comes close.

specs.Processor: Intel Core i7-14650HX (16 cores, up to 5.2GHz)
specs.Graphics: NVIDIA GeForce RTX 4060 Laptop GPU 8GB GDDR6
specs.Connectivity: USB-A 3.2 x3, USB-C, HDMI 2.0, Wi-Fi 6, BT 5.2

features: Full HD webcam with privacy shutter

laptops.name: UNIBAY Viper 15
laptops.description: Starting your gaming laptop journey? The Viper 15 pairs AMD Ryzen 7 7745HX with an NVIDIA RTX 4050 to deliver solid 1080p gaming at a wallet-friendly price. A 144Hz IPS display, dual storage slots, and fully upgradeable RAM make this the launchpad you will grow into — not out of.

specs.Processor: AMD Ryzen 7 7745HX (8 cores, up to 5.1GHz)
specs.Graphics: NVIDIA GeForce RTX 4050 Laptop GPU 6GB GDDR6
specs.Connectivity: USB-A 3.2 x2, USB-C, HDMI 2.0, Wi-Fi 6, BT 5.2

laptops.name: UNIBAY Nova 15
laptops.description: Gaming on a tight budget? The Nova 15 proves you do not have to spend a fortune for a genuine gaming experience. Paired with an RTX 3060 Laptop GPU and Intel Core i5-13500H, it handles popular titles at 1080p high settings. Lightweight at 1.9 kg with Wi-Fi 6, it is ideal for students, LAN events, or your first dedicated gaming machine.

specs.Processor: Intel Core i5-13500H (12 cores, up to 4.7GHz)
specs.Graphics: NVIDIA GeForce RTX 3060 Laptop GPU 6GB GDDR6
specs.Connectivity: USB-A 3.0 x2, USB-C, HDMI 1.4, Wi-Fi 6, BT 5.1

laptops.name: UNIBAY Spectre 16
laptops.description: The Spectre 16 is purpose-built for creative professionals who need both power and colour accuracy. A 16-inch 4K OLED display with 100% DCI-P3 and factory X-Rite Pantone calibration ensures what you see is what your clients get. Inside, the RTX 4080 handles 3D rendering, video export, and AI-assisted workflows with ease. Two Thunderbolt 4 ports let you connect dual 4K displays or ultra-fast storage simultaneously.

specs.Display: 16" 4K UHD 120Hz OLED, 550 nits, 100% DCI-P3, X-Rite calibrated
specs.Processor: Intel Core i9-14900HX (24 cores, up to 5.8GHz)
specs.Graphics: NVIDIA GeForce RTX 4080 Laptop GPU 12GB GDDR6
specs.Connectivity: Thunderbolt 4 x2, HDMI 2.1, USB-A 3.2 x2, SD UHS-II, Wi-Fi 6E

laptops.name: UNIBAY Canvas 15
laptops.description: The Canvas 15 delivers what designers, photographers, and video editors demand: an Eyesafe certified display with 100% Adobe RGB coverage and factory DeltaE < 2 calibration. The RTX 4070 handles GPU-accelerated rendering and AI-enhanced export in Lightroom, Premiere, and DaVinci Resolve. Two Thunderbolt 4 ports, an SD card UHS-II slot, and a long-life 86Wh battery make this a truly portable studio.

specs.Display: 15.6" 4K OLED 60Hz, 100% Adobe RGB, Eyesafe certified, DeltaE < 2
specs.Processor: Intel Core i7-14700HX (20 cores, up to 5.4GHz)
specs.Graphics: NVIDIA GeForce RTX 4070 Laptop GPU 8GB GDDR6
specs.Connectivity: Thunderbolt 4 x2, HDMI 2.1, USB-A 3.2 x2, SD UHS-II, Wi-Fi 6E

laptops.name: UNIBAY Stealth 14
laptops.description: At 1.49 kg and 14.9mm thin, the Stealth 14 is our thinnest gaming laptop yet. AMD Ryzen 9 8945HS with integrated Radeon 780M handles everyday tasks and light gaming effortlessly, while the NVIDIA RTX 4060 Max-Q variant steps up for serious sessions. The 14.5-inch 2.5K OLED display at 144Hz is stunning at any viewing angle.

specs.Processor: AMD Ryzen 9 8945HS (8 cores, up to 5.2GHz)
specs.Connectivity: Thunderbolt 4 x2, USB-A 3.2, HDMI 2.1, Wi-Fi 7, BT 5.4

laptops.name: UNIBAY Air 15
laptops.description: The Air 15 is built for those who need a reliable, fast, and light laptop for work, study, and everyday life. The AMD Ryzen 7 7730U delivers class-leading efficiency with up to 12 hours real-world battery. Smooth performance across Microsoft 365, web browsing, video calls, and light creative work, all in a 1.59 kg chassis with a bright 15.6-inch display.

specs.Processor: AMD Ryzen 7 7730U (8 cores, up to 4.5GHz, Radeon Graphics)
specs.Connectivity: USB-A 3.2 x2, USB-C, HDMI 1.4, Wi-Fi 6, BT 5.1

desktops.name: UNIBAY Titan X
desktops.description: The Titan X is the most powerful system we build. RTX 4090, Intel Core i9-14900K at up to 6.0GHz, 64GB DDR5-6000, and a 2TB Gen5 NVMe SSD combine to produce a machine that eats 4K gaming, 3D rendering, and 8K video editing for breakfast. Custom 360mm liquid cooling keeps thermals in check under any load. Built in UNIBAY's UK integration facility with a 1-year on-site warranty.

specs.Processor: Intel Core i9-14900K (24 cores, up to 6.0GHz, 253W TDP)
specs.Motherboard: ASUS ROG Maximus Z790 APEX (DDR5, PCIe 5.0)
specs.Case: Lian Li O11 Dynamic EVO XL (full glass, mid-tower)

features: Built and burn-in tested in the UK

desktops.name: UNIBAY Titan Pro
desktops.description: One step below absolute maximum, the Titan Pro still devastates everything in its path. RTX 4080 Super, Intel Core i9-14900KF, 32GB DDR5-6000, and 2TB Gen4 NVMe storage give you 4K Ultra gaming at 60+ fps in every title. A 360mm custom liquid loop and 850W semi-modular PSU mean cool, quiet, reliable operation. The go-to choice for streamers, enthusiasts, and content creators who also game.

specs.Processor: Intel Core i9-14900KF (24 cores, up to 6.0GHz)
specs.Cooling: 360mm AIO — be quiet! Pure Loop 2 FX
specs.Case: Fractal Design Torrent (tempered glass, high airflow)

desktops.name: UNIBAY Vortex
desktops.description: The Vortex is our most popular desktop. RTX 4070 Ti Super at 1440p delivers buttery-smooth gameplay in the most demanding titles, while the Intel Core i7-14700K provides headroom for streaming, recording, and multitasking simultaneously. The Lian Li Lancool 216 chassis with triple 160mm fans keeps everything cool and quiet. Simply the best £2,500 gaming PC money can buy.

specs.Processor: Intel Core i7-14700K (20 cores, up to 5.6GHz)
specs.Graphics: NVIDIA GeForce RTX 4070 Ti Super 16GB GDDR6X
specs.Case: Lian Li Lancool 216 (dual 160mm fan, tempered glass)

desktops.name: UNIBAY Strike
desktops.description: The Strike pairs the RTX 4070 Super with an Intel Core i7-14700 for exceptional 1440p gaming at a price that makes sense. Corsair DDR5-5200 memory, a 1TB Gen4 NVMe SSD, and a spacious Phanteks Eclipse G360A with three ARGB fans deliver a premium experience without premium pricing. Free OS installation and 24-hour stress test included as standard.

specs.Processor: Intel Core i7-14700 (20 cores, up to 5.4GHz)
specs.Motherboard: Gigabyte B760 AORUS Elite AX DDR5

desktops.name: UNIBAY Blaze
desktops.description: The Blaze hits 1080p Ultra at 144fps in virtually every game and handles 1440p high-settings with ease. Powered by AMD Ryzen 7 7700X and RTX 4060 Ti 16GB, it offers modern PCIe 5.0 storage, DDR5 memory, and Wi-Fi 6E in a clean mid-tower chassis. The perfect first serious gaming PC or secondary LAN-event rig.

specs.Processor: AMD Ryzen 7 7700X (8 cores, up to 5.4GHz)

desktops.name: UNIBAY Pulse
desktops.description: The Pulse delivers RTX 4060 performance for under £1,300. Intel Core i5-14600K punches above its weight in gaming and streaming, while the 16GB DDR5 and 1TB NVMe SSD give you a fast, responsive system from day one. ARGB case, 120mm AIO, and Wi-Fi 6E are included as standard.

specs.Processor: Intel Core i5-14600K (14 cores, up to 5.3GHz)
specs.Case: Fractal Design Pop Air RGB (3x ARGB fans)

desktops.name: UNIBAY Ignite
desktops.description: The Ignite is the entry point to serious PC gaming. AMD Ryzen 5 7600 and RX 7700 XT deliver solid 1080p performance in all major titles, and AMD FSR 3 upscaling boosts frame rates further. 16GB DDR5, 512GB NVMe, and Windows 11 come standard. Everything you need to make the jump from console to PC — no compromises, no fluff.

specs.Processor: AMD Ryzen 5 7600 (6 cores, up to 5.1GHz)

desktops.name: UNIBAY Creator Station
desktops.tagline: Built to Create. Built to Last.
desktops.description: The Creator Station is engineered for video editors, 3D artists, architects, and VFX professionals who cannot afford downtime. AMD Ryzen Threadripper 7960X with 24 cores, 128GB ECC DDR5, RTX 4090 24GB, and dual 4TB NVMe SSDs in RAID 0 deliver raw compute power that workstation customers demand. ECC memory ensures data integrity during long render sessions. Backed by our 1-year on-site warranty.

specs.Processor: AMD Ryzen Threadripper 7960X (24 cores/48 threads, up to 5.3GHz)

features: ISV certified — DaVinci Resolve, Cinema 4D, Houdini

desktops.name: UNIBAY Studio
desktops.description: The Studio brings professional-tier compute to a more accessible price. AMD Ryzen 9 7950X with 16 cores handles heavy Premiere, After Effects, and Blender workloads, while the RTX 4070 Ti covers GPU rendering and real-time viewport performance. 64GB DDR5-5200 and a 2TB Gen4 NVMe give you plenty of runway for large projects.

specs.Processor: AMD Ryzen 9 7950X (16 cores/32 threads, up to 5.7GHz)

desktops.name: UNIBAY Compact Fury
desktops.description: Do not let the size fool you. The Compact Fury squeezes RTX 4070 performance and an Intel Core i5-14600K into a 15-litre SFF chassis without thermal throttling. Dual-slot GPU, 240mm AIO cooling, and a high-efficiency 750W SFX power supply make it possible. Perfect for living-room gaming, a secondary studio PC, or anyone who demands performance without sacrificing desk space.

specs.Processor: Intel Core i5-14600K (14 cores, up to 5.3GHz)
specs.Motherboard: ASUS ROG Strix B760-I Gaming WiFi (mini-ITX)

desktops.name: UNIBAY Compact Entry
desktops.description: The Compact Entry makes SFF gaming accessible. RTX 4060 and AMD Ryzen 5 7600 in a tidy 13-litre mATX chassis deliver solid 1080p gaming. Single M.2 slot, 16GB DDR5, and Wi-Fi 6 — everything you need, nothing you do not. Ideal for dorm rooms, offices, and TV cabinets.

specs.Processor: AMD Ryzen 5 7600 (6 cores, up to 5.1GHz)

accessories.name: UNIBAY Vision 32 4K
accessories.description: The Vision 32 4K is a 32-inch 4K 144Hz IPS monitor designed for both gaming and professional creative work. With 600 nits peak brightness, 98% DCI-P3 coverage, and VESA DisplayHDR 600 certification, it covers every use case beautifully. USB-C 65W power delivery means you can run a laptop from the monitor with a single cable.

specs.Connectivity: HDMI 2.1 x2, DisplayPort 1.4 x2, USB-C 65W PD, USB-A hub x4

accessories.name: UNIBAY Vision 27 QHD
accessories.description: 27-inch QHD at 165Hz is widely regarded as the ideal combination for PC gaming, and the Vision 27 QHD delivers it flawlessly. Nano IPS panel, 1ms GTG response, G-Sync Compatible (Adaptive Sync), and vibrant colour make this the monitor to pair with any UNIBAY gaming system from the Blaze upward.

accessories.name: UNIBAY Vision 24 240Hz
accessories.description: Esports players know the difference between 144Hz and 240Hz. The Vision 24 eliminates motion blur and input lag so you react faster. A fast IPS panel at 24.5 inches is the standard competitive display format, trusted at LAN events worldwide.

accessories.name: UNIBAY Tactile Pro
accessories.description: The Tactile Pro is a full-size mechanical gaming keyboard with per-key RGB, hot-swappable switches, and a PBT doubleshot keycap set that outlasts ordinary ABS by years. Choose from Linear Red, Tactile Brown, or Clicky Blue Cherry MX switches. USB-C detachable cable, 1000Hz polling, and N-key rollover make this a premium board at a fair price.

specs.Switches: Cherry MX — Red / Brown / Blue (choose at checkout)

features: PBT doubleshot keycaps — premium feel and durability
UK ISO and US ANSI layouts available

accessories.name: UNIBAY Tactile TKL
accessories.description: Tenkeyless is the layout of choice for competitive players — more mouse room, less travel distance. The Tactile TKL delivers the same PBT keycaps, per-key RGB, and Cherry MX hot-swap sockets as the full-size Tactile Pro, minus the numpad. A compact powerhouse for desk space-conscious gamers.

specs.Switches: Cherry MX — Red / Brown (choose at checkout)

features: TKL layout for maximum mouse space

accessories.name: UNIBAY Apex Pro Mouse
accessories.description: The Apex Pro is our top gaming mouse. A 25,600 DPI optical sensor with 1% accuracy tolerance, 8 programmable buttons, dual-zone RGB, and a symmetrical 69g shell satisfy the demands of FPS, MOBA, and MMO players alike. Ultra-smooth PTFE feet and a braided USB cable round out a mouse built to win.
features: PTFE glide feet (extra set in box)

accessories.name: UNIBAY Apex Speed
accessories.description: At just 58g, the Apex Speed is our lightest gaming mouse. A honeycomb-pattern shell cuts weight without compromising rigidity, while the 16,000 DPI PixArt 3370 sensor tracks accurately at any speed. For players who prefer low-DPI setups, the lightweight design reduces wrist fatigue during marathon sessions.

accessories.name: UNIBAY Audio Pro
accessories.description: The Audio Pro delivers virtual 7.1 surround sound, a noise-cancelling detachable boom microphone, and 40mm neodymium drivers for rich, detailed audio. Memory-foam protein leather ear cups with passive noise isolation let you focus entirely on the game. Compatible with PC (USB + 3.5mm), PS5, Xbox Series X|S, and Nintendo Switch.

specs.Ear Cups: Memory foam + protein leather, passive noise isolation
specs.Cable: 2m braided + inline volume and mic control
specs.Compatibility: PC, PS5, Xbox Series X|S, Nintendo Switch

features: Memory foam protein leather ear cups
Works with PC, PS5, Xbox, Switch
